description: Tiny fragment containing an order for an ounce of ʿaqīd (a dense sugar syrup). In Judaeo-Arabic. From Abū Zikrī Kohen? There is one line in the margin that reads as "al-mamlūk" in a chancery hand, probably a continuation of the official document on verso. The Arabic text on verso reads as "al-manṣūba", probably in a chancery hand. Needs examination.
description_he: פתק קטן עם הזמנת אונקיית עקיד (סירופ סוכר סמיך); בערבית-יהודית; כנראה מאבו זיכרי כהן; זקוק לבדיקה
